inactiveSourceCertificateStatus.label: full-theta inactive source certificate
inactiveSourceCertificateStatus.reason: The full-theta source certificate gives the inactive lambda_3 upper bound and the top source lower bound after certified theta-tail and quadrature error propagation.

absorptionBudgetStatus.label: low/mid Schur absorption budget
absorptionBudgetStatus.reason: The absorption certificate proves epsilon_delta is below the available finite low/mid Schur budget.

normalizedTailConstantsStatus.label: normalized inactive-tail constants
normalizedTailConstantsStatus.reason: The normalized source model satisfies the certified inactive-tail constant and the constant is absorbable by the Schur budget.

rawUnnormalizedStatement: ||(I-P_2)E_Phi f||^2 <= absoluteTailBound <A f,f> in the certified source model.
proof: Read the certified full-theta inactive source bound.
Use Weyl perturbation of the source Gram matrix to bound lambda_3 and lambda_1.
Normalize by the certified top source lower bound.
Compare the normalized epsilon_delta with the low/mid Schur absorption budget.
notClaimedHere: This theorem does not pass the estimate to the completed high block.  That continuum passage is the job of high_block_compact_exhaustion_proof.py.
